zh.lifeSummary: 當Oda von Lüchow於1130年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 盧-丹能格盧福時，她的父親Graf Hermann von Lüchow I20歲，母親Margarethe von Warpke19歲。她於大約1157年與Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1191年10月24日在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Oda von Lüchow于1130年出生在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 盧-丹能格盧福时，她的父亲Graf Hermann von Lüchow I20岁，母亲Margarethe von Warpke19岁。她于大约1157年与Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1191年10月24日在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Lüchow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ewald, Fritz, Gerhart, Ralf.
German: habitational name from a place so named near Ludwigslust in Mecklenburg.
Polish: from the possessive form of   Mucha  .

variants.name: Mucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Alojzy, Andrzej, Boleslaw, Eugeniusz, Grazyna, Iwan, Janina, Jerzy, Jozef, Mariusz, Miroslaw.
Polish, Czech, Slovak, and Sorbian: nickname from Polish, Slovak, Sorbian and dialect Czech mucha ‘fly’, denoting an irritating person or someone considered to be of no importance. Compare Muha .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of Mukha: nickname from mukha ‘fly’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Oda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, originally perhaps a byname, derived from oddr ‘point (of a weapon)’. Occasionally in modern use it may also be a short form of compound names with this as the first element, such as Oddbjørn (+ ‘bear’).

en.lifeSummary: When Oda von Lüchow was born in 1130, in Lüchow, Lüchow-Dannenberg, Lower Saxony, Germany, her father, Graf Hermann von Lüchow I, was 20 and her mother, Margarethe von Warpke, was 19. She married Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I about 1157. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 October 1191, in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Oda von Lüchow est née en 1130, à Lüchow, Landkreis Lüchow-Dannenberg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Hermann von Lüchow I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margarethe von Warpke, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I environ 1157. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 octobre 1191, à Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Oda von Lüchow(이)가 1130년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 u초우-던버그 u초에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Hermann von Lüchow I(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarethe von Warpke(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1157년 Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 10월 24일 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Oda von Lüchow nasceu em 1130, em Lüchow, Landkreis Lüchow-Dannenberg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Hermann von Lüchow I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margarethe von Warpke, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I aproximadamente 1157. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Oda von Lüchow родилась в 1130 г. в местности лuчоу, ландкрис лuчоу-данненбирг, ниедирсачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Graf Hermann von Lüchow I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarethe von Warpke, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I около 1157 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 октября 1191 г. в местности щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I aproximadamente 1157. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1191, en Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, a la edad de 61 años.
